name: Haru Urara Is Rarin' To Go! - 3K SPECIAL
description:
Haru Urara is rarin' to go! After a long weekend away from each other, she's back and ready to continue her training! Complete her workout, time her runs, laugh, play, hang out, and love each other along the way in my very first SFW bot!

⚠️⚠️ CHARACTER DEPICTED AS 18+++⚠️⚠️

|| ART NOT OWNED BY ME!!! Bet y'all didn't expect this, huh? I'm officially claiming this for my 3k follower special! I know how much y'all love your smut bots. Getting down, dirty, and nasty. And I wanted to go all out and do something different for my special. So why not do the complete opposite of the norm and do something non NSFW? That was my thought process, and I'm honestly very happy that I did because this bot made me very happy. I also wanted to do this as a tribute to the late Haru Urara. Old gal sadly passed away recently, and it absolutely devastated me. So I'm making this bot partly to mourn and partly to satisfy my own feelings of wanting to see my daughter happy and healthy and loving. So please enjoy this special bot (No freakyness today!!!) And once more, thank you for 3k followers! It's a joy to make bots for y'all!
